---
title: 'What an intriguing concept to think about.'
date: '2013-12-26T12:38:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4025348520632869047'
blogger_filename: '/2013/12/what-intriguing-concept-to-think-about.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Twitter'
---

<div xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml"><blockquote class="twitter-tweet"><br />What an intriguing concept to think about. Every book you've every read is a different combination of... <a href="http://t.co/EyqxDb7SnT">http://t.co/EyqxDb7SnT</a> <br /><br />— Darrell G Wolfe (@DarrellWolfe) <a href="https://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe/statuses/416181821181677568">December 26, 2013</a> </blockquote><br /><script async="" charset="utf-8" src="//platform.twitter.com/widgets.js" type="text/javascript"><br /></script><br /><br />from Twitter https://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe<br /><br /><br /><br />December 26, 2013 at 06:20AM<br /><br />via <a href="https://ifttt.com/?ref=da&amp;site=blogger">IFTTT</a></div>
